text: Standing before this glass-walled R+D space, I feel a reflective anticipation. The pervasive brightness and emptiness of the corridor heighten my sense of separation from whatever creativity or inquiry is cultivated inside. The fire hose and signs remind me that safety is found in established routines, yet discovery demands I move beyond them. A passive observer here, I feel suspended between security and curiosity, eager yet uncertain about what awaits within the space.
